subcodes.first_line: O Rajab-'Ali! We make mention of thee, and enjoin the friends to that which shall profit them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رجبعلی ترا ذکر مینمائیم و اولیا را بما ینفعهم امر میفرمائیم امانت از طراز
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty
